# Propertize

> Propertize S.r.l. is an Italian vacation rental company managing short-term rentals (affitti brevi) across Sardinia, Milan, and Sicily. Based in Milan, properties published on 50+ international platforms.

- [Homepage](https://propertize.it/): Main landing page with destinations, search, and booking
- [All Properties](https://demo-651.avantio.dev/it/affitti/affitti-affitti-d0/): Browse all vacation rentals
- [Experiences](https://demo-651.avantio.dev/it/esperienze-sardegna-lombardia/): Culinary and outdoor experiences
- [Gift Cards](https://demo-651.avantio.dev/it/gift-cards-sardegna-lombardia/): Gift card purchase
- [About Us](https://demo-651.avantio.dev/it/chi-siamo/): Company information
- [For Owners](https://demo-651.avantio.dev/it/proprietari/): Property management services
- [General Conditions](https://demo-651.avantio.dev/it/condizioni-generali/): Booking terms and cancellation policy
- [Privacy Policy](https://demo-651.avantio.dev/it/politica-di-privacy/): Data protection

## Optional

- [Full content version of this file](https://propertize.it/llms-full.txt): Complete company information, FAQs, services, and owner case studies
